meta.source: UN Statistics Division National Accounts Main Aggregates Database — GDP per capita (current USD, series 5) used as proxy for HLEG Tier I #4. True household adjusted disposable income not available in AMA API.
meta.unit: USD per capita (current prices, GDP proxy)
meta.note: DATA GAP: AMA API exposes only GDP aggregates, not household sector accounts. True HH disposable income requires OECD SNA or UNECE dataset.
